scripts.dev: tsx scripts/generate-covers.ts && tsx scripts/prepare-resume.ts && tsx scripts/generate-giscus-themes.ts && next-image-export-optimizer && next dev --turbopack
scripts.dev:https: tsx scripts/generate-covers.ts && tsx scripts/prepare-resume.ts && tsx scripts/generate-giscus-themes.ts && next-image-export-optimizer && next dev --turbopack --experimental-https
scripts.build: tsx scripts/generate-covers.ts && tsx scripts/generate-og-images.ts && tsx scripts/prepare-resume.ts && tsx scripts/generate-giscus-themes.ts && next build --webpack && next-image-export-optimizer
scripts.preview:docker: mkdir -p certificates && HOST_UID=$(id -u) HOST_GID=$(id -g) docker compose up --build
